title: MotdEngine
description: Dynamic MOTD Rotation for Your Server
body:
MotdEngine is a lightweight and powerful plugin that allows you to customize and rotate your server’s Message of the Day (MOTD) — the message shown in the multiplayer server list.

Whether you want to welcome players, promote events, or simply add some style to your server, MotdEngine lets you do it all with colorful, rotating messages.

Supports color codes (&a, &b, etc.) and multi-line MOTDs (\n)

Rotate between multiple MOTDs randomly or in order

️ Easy configuration via config.yml

♻️ Reload the plugin without restarting using /motd reload

Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21 and future versions

Lightweight and efficient — no external dependencies
